summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3D Portfolio website. All backend APIs (15 tests) passed. Frontend UI tests passed - Hero with 3D canvas, Projects (8 cards), Skills (13 skills in 6 categories), Dashboard, and Barbershop Finder all working correctly.

minor.issue: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: THREE.Clock deprecation warning - consider migrating to THREE.Timer in Scene3D.js for future compatibility
test_credentials: No authentication required for this portfolio app
seed_data_creation: None - data already seeded in PostgreSQL
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend uses C# ASP.NET Core 8.0 with PostgreSQL. Dashboard metrics and Barbershop data are MOCKED (random/in-memory). 3D scene uses vanilla Three.js (not R3F) due to @emergentbase/visual-edits compatibility.

mocked_apis_list: /api/dashboard/systems - hardcoded system nodes with random metrics

projects_api.GET /api/projects: PASS - Returns 8 projects with all required fields

skills_api.GET /api/skills: PASS - Returns 13 skills with categories and levels

dashboard_api.GET /api/dashboard/metrics: PASS - Returns CPU, memory, throughput, connections

barbershop_api.POST /api/barbershop/search: PASS - Returns nearby shops based on location

frontend_ui_tests.projects_section: PASS - 8 project cards displayed with images, titles, technologies
frontend_ui_tests.skills_section: PASS - 6 categories, 13 skills with progress bars
frontend_ui_tests.navigation: PASS - All nav links working (About, Projects, Skills, Contact)
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_page: PASS - All metrics, charts, system status, alerts displayed
frontend_ui_tests.barbershop_finder_page: PASS - Map, search controls, barbershop listings working
frontend_ui_tests.view_live_demo_buttons: PASS - Both Dashboard and Barbershop Finder demos navigate correctly
